prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约1162→897→512→395→300，呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约862名，2025年基准约300名；本省理科组计划2021年43人→2022年31人→2023年32人→2024年17人→2025年12人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划12人，与2025年持平，计划缩减趋势暂缓。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2021年第11→2022年第13→2023年第13→2024年第16→2025年第14→2026年第12，稳居全国Top20顶尖工科强校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类舆情，无重大负面事件；抖音学校热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（中关注），但2025年位次已大幅前移，异常影响已消化；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个：力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+；仪器科学与技术、土木工程、控制科学与工程、数学、电气工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程为A；信息与通信工程、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、建筑学、航空宇航科学与技术为A-，工科实力极为突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与哈工大优势学科高度契合；广西2026年考生总数约39.2万，物理类估算约26.4万，较2025年物理类26.0万略有增加；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省（东北地区），广西属华南地区，跨省报考；该校在广西招生占比约2.1%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、学校顶尖工科层次与高热抖音关注度、工科专业热度持续升温等因素，在2025年基准300名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约280名，区间230–330名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 1162 → 897 → 512 → 395 → 300, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 862 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 300 in 2025; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 43 in 2021 → 31 in 2022 → 32 in 2023 → 17 in 2024 → 12 in 2025, showing a year-on-year reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 12, unchanged from 2025, indicating a temporary halt in the reduction trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026: 11th → 13th → 13th → 16th → 14th → 12th, firmly in the top 20 national top engineering strong schools; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management public opinion, with no major negative events; Douyin school popularity ranking 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (medium attention), but the ranking has significantly moved forward in 2025, and the abnormal impact has been digested; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering are A+; Instrument Science and Technology, Civil Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Electrical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering are A; Information and Communication Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Architecture, Aerospace Science and Technology are A-, with extremely outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation and other engineering majors are continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly consistent with HIT's advantageous disciplines; the total number of Guangxi candidates in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated 264,000 in the physics category, a slight increase from 260,000 in 2025; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province (Northeast China), Guangxi is in South China, cross-province application; the school's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1% (2025), which is moderately low, and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the top engineering level of the school and high Douyin attention, and the continuous heating up of engineering major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 300, competition is expected to intensify slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 280, with a range of 230–330.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 230–330, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction and Tier 1 majors as a sprint target; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 230), you can focus on sprinting for the Tier 1 AI Academician Special Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 330), you need to be cautious with safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1002 → 957 → 1025 → 1206 → 851, with significant fluctuations. In 2025, the ranking moved forward by about 355 places compared to 2024, with a baseline of approximately 851. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 3 in 2021 → 8 in 2022 → 15 in 2023 → 17 in 2024 → 7 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 10, an increase of about 42.9% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, among the top 20 universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed. It ranks 10th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with overall high attention, but liberal arts majors are not the university's strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Economic Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Law, etc.) is the only enrollment major in the liberal arts group, with socially divided and wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Guangxi is about 128,000, an increase of about 7.3% from 119,000 in 2025. The provincial control line for undergraduate batches from 2024 to 2025 is about 400–402 points, basically stable. Cross-provincial application: HIT's liberal arts enrollment proportion in Guangxi is extremely low, and regional preference is not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in rankings in 2025, the planned enrollment expansion of about 42.9% in 2026 but also the increase in examinees, the top-tier university level but non-dominant liberal arts, and other factors, the downward pull of expansion on rankings and the upward push of increased examinees roughly offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1070, with a range of 948–1192.
